videos.headline: Andrew Paul punches in Jacksonville State TD
videos.description: Andrew Paul barrels into the end zone to put Jacksonville State on the board vs. Louisiana Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Andrew Paul punches in Jacksonville State TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jacksonville State pulls off Hail Mary, miss extra point en route to OT
videos.description: Jacksonville State manages to pull off a Hail-Mary touchdown as time expires, only to miss the potential game-winning extra point as they go to overtime vs. Louisiana Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jacksonville State pulls off Hail Mary, miss extra point en route to OT) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tru Edwards breaks through for 86-yard Louisiana Tech TD
videos.description: Tru Edwards dodges tackles to break off for an 86-yard touchdown for Louisiana Tech vs. Jacksonville State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tru Edwards breaks through for 86-yard Louisiana Tech TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tre Stewart runs in a TD for Jacksonville State
videos.description: Tre Stewart finds the end zone to restore Jacksonville State's lead vs. Louisiana Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tre Stewart runs in a TD for Jacksonville State) 2024/11/09 ESHEET
